data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for retry-safe ingestion with idempotency and failure visibility. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or endpoints that demonstrate this capability. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in the coverage of the requirement, as there are no details on how the system handles retries or ensures idempotency during the ingestion process.
gaps: No evidence of retry-safe ingestion with idempotency and failure visibility.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for retry-safe ingestion
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the ingestion process can handle retries without duplicating records.
